## Purpose

What problem does this solve?

## Changes

What changed in the skill, scripts, or docs?

## Evaluation

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] Rejected-plan behavior was checked.
- [ ] No-learning-evidence behavior was checked.
- [ ] Durable storage remains opt-in if storage behavior changed.

## Public Release Hygiene

- [ ] No private project names, secrets, or local paths were added.
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies were added.
- [ ] README and manifests still match the skill name and folder.
